productDisplayName: Puma Men Grey Honeycomb Polo T-shirt
description: Style Note German brand puma specialises in minimalism and simplicity. This T-shirt from Puma is the kind you can't have enough of. This piece's crush-worthy colour and stylish cut is an off-duty must have. Pair this piece with fitted denims and bright canvas shoes.
